description: NEAR 1Click Swap tool. Lists supported tokens across blockchains, requests cross-chain swap quotes, submits deposit transaction hashes to speed up processing, and checks swap execution status via the Defuse 1Click API (chaindefuser.com). No API key required.

action.description: Operation to perform: 'get_tokens' lists supported tokens, 'get_quote' requests a swap quote, 'submit_tx_hash' notifies the system of a deposit TX to speed up processing, 'get_status' checks swap execution status

dry.description: [get_quote] Simulate without generating a real deposit address

swap_type.description: [get_quote] Swap type: EXACT_INPUT fixes input amount, EXACT_OUTPUT fixes output amount

deposit_type.description: [get_quote] How the deposit is made: ORIGIN_CHAIN means on-chain deposit, INTENTS uses the intents protocol

amount.description: [get_quote] Amount in the token's smallest unit (e.g. '1000000000000000000000000' for 1 wNEAR with 24 decimals)

refund_to.description: [get_quote] Address to refund to on failure

refund_type.description: [get_quote] How refunds are sent: ORIGIN_CHAIN or INTENTS

recipient_type.description: [get_quote] How the output is delivered: DESTINATION_CHAIN or INTENTS

deadline.description: [get_quote] ISO 8601 datetime when the deposit becomes inactive (e.g. '2026-03-19T00:00:00Z')

tx_hash.description: [submit_tx_hash] Blockchain transaction hash of the deposit

near_sender_account.description: [submit_tx_hash] Sender account, required only for NEAR blockchain transactions

memo.description: [submit_tx_hash] Memo used when submitting the deposit, if any

deposit_address.description: [submit_tx_hash, get_status] Deposit address returned by get_quote

deposit_memo.description: [get_status] Deposit memo if one was included in the quote response
